enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable the fallback router without uninstalling it

primaryProvider.label: Primary Provider
primaryProvider.help: The provider to use first (e.g. "codex"). When this provider hits a rate limit, quota, or auth error, requests are routed to the fallback.

fallbackChain.label: Fallback Chain
fallbackChain.help: Ordered list of fallback providers to try when the primary fails (e.g. ["claude-code"])

cooldownMinutes.label: Cooldown (minutes)
cooldownMinutes.help: How long to skip a failed provider after a detected failure. During this window the fallback is used directly without retrying the primary.

errorPatterns.label: Error Patterns
errorPatterns.help: Text patterns that trigger a fallback. Plain strings are case-insensitive substring matches. Use "/regex/flags" format for regular expressions.

injectStatusHint.label: Inject Status Hint
injectStatusHint.help: When enabled, a system-prompt notice is prepended when the primary provider is in cooldown, informing the agent of the recommended fallback.

stateFile.label: State File Path
stateFile.help: Override the cooldown state file location. Default: ~/.openclaw/fallback-router.state.json

cooldownMinutes.description: Minutes to skip a failed provider (1–10080 = 1 week)

errorPatterns.description: Strings or /regex/flags patterns that trigger fallback

injectStatusHint.description: Prepend a system-prompt notice when primary is in cooldown

stateFile.description: Override path to cooldown state file
